productDisplayName: Mr.Men Men's Funny Nature Blue T-shirt
description: CompositionCobalt blue round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with graphic print on the frontFittingComfortWash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking, remove promptly Line dry inside-out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery If you are the funny bone of your gang, there’s no better way to advertise this special trait of yours than with this t-shirt from mr. men. Made of pure cotton fabric, this tee wicks away sweat and keeps you comfortable and dry during your comic moments, while the graphic print on the front sets the humorous tone.
